stories.headline: In shift, Trump praises Zelensky, will let Ukraine build Patriot missiles
stories.summary: It was a dramatic departure from Trump’s more acerbic tone toward Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky, whom he once derided as ungrateful.

stories.headline: Trump grants Ukraine licence to produce Patriot missiles
stories.summary: US president agrees to longstanding demand from Kyiv to make its own PAC-3 interceptors

stories.headline: US to give Ukraine licence to produce Patriot air-defence interceptors, Trump says
stories.summary: Donald Trump said the US will grant Ukraine a licence to produce Patriot interceptors after more than six months of lobbying from Kyiv.

stories.headline: Trump skips new Air Force One on return from Turkey NATO summit
stories.summary: Asked during a press conference whether the change was for security reasons related to Iran, Trump sidestepped the question by talking about previous alleged assassination attempts by Tehran.

stories.headline: Top Democrats press Maine Senate candidate to drop out of race over sexual assault allegation
stories.summary: Graham Platner denied the allegation, calling it "categorically false" but said he was "taking the time to reflect on the best path forward".

stories.headline: Trump takes aim at 'wasted cause' Spain and revives Greenland claim at Nato summit
stories.summary: The US president lashes out at fellow Nato member Spain, repeating an earlier threat to cut off trade relations.

stories.headline: U.S. Begins Second Day of Strikes Against Iran
stories.summary: President Trump said earlier that a cease-fire was over and warned that the United States would probably hit Iran “hard.”

stories.headline: Sabre-rattling to ‘tremendous love’: erratic Trump dominates final hours of Nato summit

stories.headline: US expands military strikes on Iran after Trump says he’ll ‘hit them hard’
stories.summary: US forces have expanded their military strikes on Iran, after blaming Tehran for breaking the MoU to end the war.

stories.headline: Trump departs NATO summit on older Air Force One
stories.summary: Trump departed the NATO summit on an older Air Force One after arriving aboard the new Qatar-gifted aircraft.

stories.headline: US says conducting new wave of strikes on Iran as ceasefire falters
stories.summary: Second night of strikes comes after Trump says ceasefire 'over', suggests talks for lasting peace will continue.

stories.headline: Trump tempers fury with allies and ends 'tremendously successful' NATO summit on high note
stories.summary: European leaders showcased their surging defence spending at the summit as they looked to convince Trump they're making good on a pledge to ramp up budgets and take more responsibility for their own security.

stories.headline: US forces launch new strikes on Iran to curb threat to Hormuz, military says
stories.summary: Trump had said that the ceasefire with Iran is "over" after Washington launched strikes on the country overnight, to which Iran responded by targeting US bases in the Gulf.

stories.headline: US launches more strikes on Iran with blasts reported in south of country
stories.summary: Trump says the attacks are "retribution for yesterday's bombing of ships by Iran". Iran earlier promised strong retaliation.

stories.headline: Ukraine to get licence to produce Patriot missiles, Trump says
stories.summary: Although the Patriots are highly effective against Russia's ballistic missiles, they also have lengthy production times.

stories.headline: US and Iran trade strikes after tankers hit in Strait of Hormuz
stories.summary: The US military says it hit missile sites and command centres while Iran says it attacked US bases.

stories.headline: US launches second day of strikes against Iran
stories.summary: Trump claims Iran has ‘called’ to negotiate but the president casts doubt on the prospects of a deal

stories.headline: Oil Extends Surge as Fresh US Strikes Against Iran Rattle Market
stories.summary: Oil extended a powerful surge as the US struck targets in Iran for a second day, raising risks for energy supplies from the region.

stories.headline: Trump Says Ukraine Can Make Patriot Missiles
stories.summary: American Enterprise Institute Senior Fellow Angela Stent  discusses President Trump's announcement he would allow Ukraine to make its own Patriot Missiles. She says Trump "sees that Ukraine looks like a winner, that it has cards that the Ukrainians are really fighting back." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Democrats Grow Frustrated as Graham Platner Resists Dropping Out Quickly in Maine
stories.summary: Two days after a woman accused Graham Platner of rape, he had not given up his Senate nomination in Maine, even as state Democrats announced plans to hold a nominating convention if he steps down.

stories.headline: If Platner Exits Senate Race, the Maine Democratic Party Chair Could Help Pick the Nominee
stories.summary: Charles Dingman, chair of the Maine Democratic Party and a progressive, would play a key role in choosing the state’s Democratic Senate candidate if Graham Platner leaves the race.

stories.headline: U.S. and Iran launch fresh strikes following attacks on commercial ships
stories.summary: Iran said it had targeted more than 80 U.S. military facilities in Bahrain and Kuwait, after the U.S. launched strikes in response to attacks on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.headline: Cubans protest after third nationwide power cut this year
stories.summary: While Cuban officials said that power had been mostly restored, those still left in the dark vented their anger.

stories.summary: In a country with more sand than soil, forging food security is not so straightforward. So, what does it take to grow resilience closer to home? Qatar in Motion explores how Qatar rewrote the rules of agriculture to reshape what is possible in the desert.

stories.headline: Rare earths from Trump-backed US mines sold to Asia
stories.summary: Miners backed by the US administration sell to Japan and South Korea despite push to develop domestic supply chain

stories.headline: Luxury Car Firm DuPont Registry Group to Pick Banks for IPO
stories.summary: DuPont Registry Group, a luxury car marketplace and media company, has picked banks for a US initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.

stories.headline: Samsung, SK Hynix and Leveraged ETFs Drive 70% of Korea Trading
stories.summary: Retail fervor over leveraged ETFs in South Korea has grown so intense that the products, together with the two chipmaker stocks they track, now make up more than 70% of trading value in the $4.3 trillion market.

stories.headline: Noteholders to Aston Martin Sign Cooperation Pact Amid Debt Rout

stories.headline: Judge Hannah C. Dugan Faces Fine But No Prison Time

stories.summary: Researchers testing a cheap, homegrown oil in Uganda found what cats knew all along – it worked as well as the artificial chemical used globally A homegrown catnip lotion has proven “just as effective as Deet” as a mosquito repellant in trials carried out in Uganda.Catnip, or Nepeta cataria, is a common herb from the mint family. stories.headline: Iran's supreme leader absent as senior officials attend ayatollah's funeral

stories.headline: Keiko Fujimori declared winner of Peru's presidential election weeks after vote
stories.summary: The daughter of disgraced president Alberto Fujimori is declared winner of tight race nearly a month after voting took place.

stories.headline: Iran nuclear and military damage revealed after restricted satellite images released
stories.summary: Targets hit include ballistic missile infrastructure, nuclear sites, and naval bases.

stories.headline: Syria's president names final 70 lawmakers to new post-Assad parliament
